arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich Town - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's Gunners look to close gap at the top plus updates from Brighton vs Brentford
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates from the Premier League kick-offs between Arsenal vs Ipswich Town and Brighton vs Brentford.

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo sends wordless message after Arsenal handed major January transfer update
arts.sum: Dani Olmo has sent a message on social media following a major Barcelona transfer update amid links to Arsenal, Manchester United and Manchester City. Olmo's agent was spotted in Manchester earlier this week with United and City both having been linked in recent trading periods.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in talks to sell winger as Mikel Arteta sets record straight on January signings
arts.sum: Arsenal are open to strengthening their attacking options in the January transfer window but there could also be departures with winger Marquinhos now headed for the exit door

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Gunners would move second behind Liverpool with third straight victory at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups as Gunners return without Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to close the gap on Liverpool at the top of the table, but will be without Saka after the England star’s hamstring injury

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus fires early Arsenal team news hint vs Ipswich as big Mikel Arteta decision made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is facing a number of team selection decisions for Arsenal's Premier League clash against Ipswich with one of those involving Gabriel Jesus. While Arteta will be delighted at his form in front of goal, the Arsenal boss has lost a key part of his attack with Bukayo Saka set to miss a significant period due to a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: 'I regret my decision to quit Arsenal every day – I was left disgusted at Chelsea'
arts.sum: Emmanuel Petit made the controversial decision to leave Arsenal for Chelsea in 2001, but his time at Stamford Bridge was far from enjoyable as his club career fizzled out

arts.ttl: Arsenal academy winger inspired by Thierry Henry spotted in first-team training ahead of Ipswich clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to close the gap on Premier League leaders Liverpool to six points when they host Ipswich Town on Friday night. The Gunners...

arts.ttl: Quitting Arsenal is my big regret - things weren't the same at Chelsea
arts.sum: "If I was Philippe Coutinho, every morning I would wake up and think to myself, 'Why, why, did I sign [for Barcelona] in Spain?'" Petit told Mirror Football . Because, I can remember the time when I'd wake up, when I was at Barcelona, when I left Arsenal, and I was thinking the same way, 'why did I leave?

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton shares the 'important' thing that now needs to happen at Arsenal as he predicts tonight's score
arts.sum: Arsenal will try to narrow the gap between themselves and Premier League leaders Liverpool when they host Ipswich Town at the Emirates Stadium on Friday...
